# Auto-generated prettier chain signature. Do not edit manually.
# Regenerate: deno task fixtures:update:formatted <pattern>
#
# Each %%PASS=N%% section is exactly prettier^N(output_prettier.<ext>).
# This file exists when prettier is non-idempotent on output_prettier.* — it pins
# the full chain so the audit recognizes the case and the validator catches drift.
# See docs/fixture_overview.md (rule F4) and crates/tsv_debug/src/fixtures/audit_signature.rs.

%%PASS=2 (fixed point)%%
<script lang="ts">
	// Own-line block comment after `as`, before the type: kept on its own line,
	// type on the next line (tsv preserves the author's placement).
	const a = x /* a */ as A;

	// `satisfies` behaves the same.
	const b = x /* b */ satisfies B;

	// A blank line after the comment is preserved.
	const c = x /* c */ as C;

	// A same-line block comment with the type authored on the next line keeps the
	// type on that line (comment trailing the keyword); preserving the author's break.
	const d = x /* d */ as D;

	// A same-line block comment with the type glued to it stays fully inline (not a
	// divergence — both formatters keep it).
	const e = x as /* e */ E;
</script>
